name: jim-scripts-typescript-tools
description: Monorepo workspace for EPS TypeScript CLI tools

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace data-generators && npm run build --workspace nhs-number-utils && npm run build --workspace prescription-id-generator && npm run build --workspace fhir-create-prescription-generator && npm run build --workspace eps-auth && npm run build --workspace fhir-prescribing && npm run build --workspace fhir-dispensing && npm run build --workspace pfp-request-sender && npm run build --workspace psu-request-generator && npm run build --workspace psu-request-sender && npm run build --workspace psu-request-wizard
